title: People's War
subTitle: When an industrialist decides to start a thermal power plant project in Srikakulam district, a young leader and an honest politician protest against it with the support of the villagers.

subTitle: Sridhar, a criminal lawyer, fights against dishonest and corrupt people and provides justice to the needy, infuriating his uncle and the village head.

subTitle: A man develops an unexpected friendship with the new owner of his stolen bike and attempts to seek a mutually beneficial arrangement.

subTitle: Bhavani is an orphan and an ardent devotee of Goddess Ammoru. The goddess comes to Bhavani's rescue when a vengeful and evil Ghorakh intends to ruin her life.

title: Don Seenu
subTitle: Inspired by Amitabh Bachchan's Don, a fan sets out to make a name for himself in the underworld. However, a case of mistaken identity may turn this endeavour into a comedy of errors.

title: Donga Dongadi
subTitle: A young boy's terrible behaviour towards girls makes his father lose respect for him. So, he begins to turn his life around to gain back his father's trust.

title: Alluda Majaka
subTitle: Living in the company of two hostile, rich families, a righteous man attempts to clear his sister's name and restore her honour.

title: Sri Karam
subTitle: Siva uses street plays to fight injustice, while Geeta admires his ideals and Vasantha's painful experience triggers a chain of life-changing events for everyone around her.

subTitle: Ram, a careless youth, grows up oblivious to the sacrifices his father makes in order to fulfil all his desires. However, a major incident motivates him to change his ways.

title: Avatharam
subTitle: When Karkotakudu, a monster, attempts to destroy Earth to take control of the planet, Rajeshwari, a devotee of Goddess Akkamma, decides to fight the behemoth.

title: Raju Bhai
subTitle: Raju, the right-hand man of a gangster, falls in love with Anjali and changes his criminal ways. Their relationship suffers due to misunderstandings between them.

title: Hanuman Junction
subTitle: A man falls in love with the sister of two gangsters. However, in order to marry her, he must convince her brothers and thus decides to join their company.

title: Aapadbandhavudu
subTitle: Madhava, a servant, falls in love with Hema, his employer's daughter, but is unable to show it due to societal norms. He later decides to help her when she is suddenly put in a psychiatric hospital.

title: Seethapathi Samsaram

title: Sri Ram

title: Priyamaina Neeku
subTitle: Ganesh (Tarun) is a carefree college youth from Hyderabad (Tamil Version as Coimbatore), whose life revolves around friends and doing good deeds for them which upsets his father Raja Shekar (Tanikella Bharani)/(Tamil Version as Pyramid Natarajan). One day he fumbles upon a Red diary in his father's auction shop. It is a diary left behind unknowingly by Sandhya (Sneha).

title: 7th Sense
subTitle: Dong Lee comes from China to to start a biological war in India. Subha comes to know about his operation and approaches Aravind, a descendant of Bodhidharma, to combat Lee and ruin his plan.

title: Gudumba Shankar
subTitle: Gudumba Shankar falls in love with Gowri and finds out that she is being forced to marry Kumar Swamy, a gangster. Shankar must find a way to stop him and save Gowri.

title: Naa Alludu
subTitle: Karthik, a young man, applies for a job but gets rejected by Bhanumathi even though he is qualified for it. As a result, he holds a grudge against her and decides to marry her daughter.

title: World Famous Lover
subTitle: An anthology of four inspiring love stories that showcase the diverse perspectives towards love that are prevalent among the different strata of human society.
